hook.text: BRANTHWAITE WANTED BY UNITED CITY AND BAYERN

beats.text: EVERTON WOULD DEMAND MORE THAN £70M FOR HIM
UNITED BID TWICE IN 2024 BUT EVERTON SAID NO
CITY UNITED AND BAYERN ALL NOW IN THE RACE
WINDOW OPENS JUNE 15 — WILL INEOS BID AGAIN

caption: Branthwaite is back on United's radar — the Daily Mail reports Man City, United and Bayern Munich are all monitoring the 25-year-old Everton CB. Everton want £70m+. United had personal terms agreed and submitted two bids in 2024, both rejected. Third time lucky? 🔴 RUMOUR — per Daily Mail (via Sky Sports paper talk).
